action.reasoning: Observation: Train failed immediately on albumentations init (RandomResizedCrop scale>1.0 invalid in this version + size expects tuple/kwargs; val/predict Resize likely affected too). No training or eval occurred. Analysis: Pydantic validation in current albumentations version enforces scale <=1.0 (area ratio) and explicit height/width; simple FCN-ResNet50 baseline otherwise valid (pre-downloaded weights, label remapping correct, metric/logging/predict contract followed, DataParallel missing for 4-GPU use). Decision: Fix transforms with height/width kwargs + scale=(0.5,1.0), add nn.DataParallel for all 4 GPUs, clean redundant interpolate in predict.py, set epochs=3 for quick baseline, run train then submit_eval on best.pt to obtain first mIoU and iteration timing before optimizing backbone/augs/scheduler.
